title: carex scaberrima
intro: Carex scaberrima, also known as the rough-stemmed sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Carex scaberrima include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
